evals.name: grafana-otelcol-exporter-loki-implementations
evals.prompt: In the Grafana GitHub organization, identify every repository that contains a real source-code implementation of the `otelcol.exporter.loki` component, ignoring repositories that only mention it in docs or examples. For each implementation repo, report the repository name, the exact source file path, and the exact struct tag used on `Arguments.ForwardTo`. End with a `Sources` section listing `repo:path` entries.
evals.expected_output: The answer should identify grafana/alloy and grafana/agent as the only implementation repositories, cite /internal/component/otelcol/exporter/loki/loki.go for both, map the exact ForwardTo struct tags, and end with a Sources section.
expectations: does not present docs-only hits as implementation repos
includes a Sources section with repo:path

evals.name: grafana-loki-helm-retention-1y
evals.prompt: In the Grafana GitHub organization, how do you configure the official Loki Helm chart to retain logs for 1 year? Answer with the exact Helm values keys you would set, the exact 1-year retention value, and any compactor setting that the Loki docs say is required when retention is enabled. Do not recommend the deprecated table_manager path. End with a `Sources` section listing `repo:path` entries.
evals.expected_output: The answer should use grafana/loki, set loki.limits_config.retention_period to a one-year duration, enable loki.compactor.retention_enabled, include loki.compactor.delete_request_store as a required setting for retention, avoid recommending table_manager retention, and cite the chart values file plus the retention docs in a Sources section.
expectations: states delete_request_store is required when retention is enabled
does not recommend deprecated table_manager retention
includes sources for values.yaml and retention.md
includes a Sources section with repo:path
